diff:
diff --git a/src/preview.py b/src/preview.py
index 09f54fe..896ee9f 100644
--- a/src/preview.py
+++ b/src/preview.py
@@ -1,6 +1,13 @@
 def preview_text(text: str, limit: int) -> str:
+    """Return a preview of the text, truncated to at most `limit` characters.
+    If truncation is needed and the limit is greater than 3, the preview
+    will consist of the first `limit-3` characters followed by an ellipsis.
+    If the limit is 3 or less, the preview simply contains the first
+    `limit` characters (or the whole string if it is shorter)."""
     if limit < 0:
         raise ValueError("limit must be non-negative")
     if len(text) <= limit:
         return text
-    return text[:limit] + "..."
+    if limit <= 3:
+        return text[:limit]
+    return text[:limit - 3] + "..."
